channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 5 Penn State bottles up Jeanty, beats No. 8 Boise State 31-14 in Fiesta Bowl
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Penn State defenders clogged every hole, stretched out every outside run, closed with ferocity. Everywhere that Ashton Jeanty turned, he ran into Nittany Lions. The Heisman Trophy runner-up still went over 100 yards, but he sure had to work for it.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona State extends coach Kenny Dillingham 5 more years, AP source says
item.description: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham has agreed to a five-year contract extension on the eve of the Sun Devils' College Football Playoff quarterfinal game, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jeanty falls short of record as dream season gets stuffed by Penn State defense in CFP loss
item.description: Ashton Jeanty took the handoff on Boise State’s first play and made it just a few steps before being greeted by a wall of dark blue Penn State jerseys that swallowed him up and shoved him backward for no gain.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — St. Louis coach Jim Montgomery walked around before Tuesday night's Winter Classic. He looked at the growing crowd soaking in the festive atmosphere. He thought about all the famous ballplayers who played at Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Quinn Ewers' former Texas teammate posts cryptic message after rumor of $6 million offer for QB to transfer
item.description: Quinn Ewers reportedly has a $6 million offer to transfer out of Texas instead of going pro, but his former teammate said that would be a waste of money.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson vs Josh Allen MVP debate divides NFL media
item.description: The NFL MVP race between Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen and Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson is coming down to the final week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pro Picks: Lions will beat the Vikings in showdown for the NFC's No. 1 seed
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed, two division titles and two playoff spots are on the line in Week 18 of the NFL's regular season. Game No. 272 on Sunday night between the Detroit Lions and Minnesota Vikings is a showdown for the NFC North and the conference’s top spot. The loser drops to the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Wayne Rooney fired as Plymouth coach with team last in Championship
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Wayne Rooney was fired as Plymouth Argyle coach on Tuesday after just seven months in charge of the struggling Championship team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions beat the 49ers 40-34 in a tune-up for Week 18 division showdown
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The big prizes for the Detroit Lions remain on the horizon, with the team seeking a division title, the top seed in the NFC playoffs and the franchise's first Super Bowl trip.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brock Purdy's elbow was 'on fire' after hit but he says his surgically repaired ligament is fine
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Brock Purdy hurt his surgically repaired throwing elbow late in a loss to the Detroit Lions on Monday night, the latest blow in an injury-plagued season for the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blues dominate Blackhawks 6-2 in Discover NHL Winter Classic
item.description: The St. Louis Blues and Chicago Blackhawks will close the 2024 calendar year with a head-to-head battle outdoors: The NHL Discover Winter Classic.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, WGN 9

item.title: Six former Florida State players sue coach Leonard Hamilton over failed NIL payments
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Six former Florida State basketball players sued Seminoles coach Leonard Hamilton on Monday, alleging he failed to make good on a promise to get each of them $250,000 in name, image and likeness compensation. The plaintiffs — Darin Green Jr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: On his 40th, LeBron James says he could play "another 5 or 7 years." He won't stay around that long
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James celebrated his 40th birthday on Monday with gratitude for his basketball longevity and optimism about his future with the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Sixers for sixth straight home loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey each scored 32 points to lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 114-111 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: The path of Matthew Stafford looms for Caleb Williams
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — A skilled quarterback burdened by the dysfunction of his organization, doomed to toil in mediocrity for over a decade despite a high level of performance year in and year out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bulls blow 21 point lead in 141-133 loss to Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jalen Johnson had a career-high 30 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied from a late 21-point deficit by scoring 50 points in the fourth quarter in a 141-133 win over the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs Seahawks Preview: Inactives, Caleb Williams' development and a shot at the wrong kind of history
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — For the last time this season, the Chicago Bears will take to Soldier Field with a bit of dubious history on the line. The Bears (4-11) are losers of nine straight and will take on a Seattle Seahawks squad (8-7) who's playoff hopes dangle in the balance.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
